.github/workflows/build.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 11 instead of JDK 8 for the build environment.

.github/workflows/publish.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 11 instead of JDK 8 for the build environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 11; keeping version 8 would misconfigure the build environment for the new target.
